message.content:
{
  "analysis": "The solution has 115 commands but the game had 262 moves. The 1fps frame rate misses many commands. I need to process all 951 HQ frames. Let me run a more efficient batch OCR on the remaining frames.",
  "plan": "Run the batch OCR on the remaining HQ frames (60 done, 891 remaining) using a more efficient approach. Then re-run the extraction script on all frames.",
  "commands": [
    {
      "keystrokes": "# Resume the batch OCR from where it left off
cd /tmp/frames_hq
counter=0
for f in frame_*.png; do
    outfile="/tmp/ocr_hq/${f%.png}.txt"
    if [ ! -f "$outfile" ]; then
        tesseract "$f" "/tmp/ocr_hq/${f%.png}" 2>/dev/null &
        counter=$((counter + 1))
        if [ $((counter % 4)) -eq 0 ]; then
            wait
        fi
    fi
done
wait
echo "Done processing additional frames"
",
      "duration": 120.0
    }
  ],
  "task_complete": false
}
